title: mimulus guttatus subsp. micranthus
intro: Mimulus guttatus subsp. micranthus is a subspecies of the yellow monkey flower plant, known for its bright yellow flowers and native habitat in the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The medicinal properties of Mimulus guttatus subsp. micranthus are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve mental clarity, thanks to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote better sleep. Herbal preparations of Mimulus guttatus subsp. micranthus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically used to support mental well-being and promote relaxation.
